$description: Motion system — durations, easings, and composite transition presets. UI motion is 100–300ms, never exceeds 500ms. Every animation guides attention, shows connection, or provides feedback. Always paired with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.

instant.$description: No animation — reduced-motion fallback, or instant state swaps

fast.$description: Micro-interactions — hover, focus, small color/opacity changes

base.$description: Default UI transition — most state changes, toggles, dropdowns

moderate.$description: Larger transitions — modals, drawers, accordions, page sections

slow.$description: Maximum allowed — full-screen transitions, large reveals. Never exceed this.

linear.$description: Constant speed — only for continuous loops (spinners, progress)

ease-out.$description: Decelerate — for ENTRANCES. Elements arrive fast and settle. The default for most UI.

ease-in.$description: Accelerate — for EXITS. Elements leave by speeding away.

ease-in-out.$description: Accelerate then decelerate — for STATE CHANGES that move in place (toggles, reorders)

spring.$description: Overshoot — playful emphasis (success checkmarks, badges). Use sparingly.

transition.$description: Composite presets — duration + easing pairs ready to apply. Reference these in components.

micro.$description: Hover/focus on atoms — buttons, links, inputs

default.$description: General-purpose state change — the safe default

enter.$description: Element entering the screen — modal open, toast appear, menu reveal

exit.$description: Element leaving the screen — exits are faster than entrances

keyframes.$description: Named keyframe recipes. Property/from/to are documented for implementers; encode as CSS @keyframes or framework equivalents.

fade-in.$description: Reduced-motion-safe substitute for any directional entrance

slide-up.$description: Subtle rise on entrance — popovers, toasts. Pair with fade.

spin.$description: Loading spinner — use with duration 600–1000ms and linear easing

reducedMotion.$description: When prefers-reduced-motion is set: replace movement with opacity-only fades or instant swaps. Never remove feedback entirely — keep the state change, drop the travel.

duration.$description: Collapse all motion durations to instant, OR cap at duration.fast for opacity-only fades

strategy.$value: Disable transform/position animation; retain opacity fade ≤100ms; keep all non-motion feedback (color, text, ARIA live regions)
